Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x7960 "DONKEYKONGARCADE-8860-7960" -Di_table_addr=0x02 -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$3f sta $01 jsr $8860 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Donkey Kong Arcade (Oxyron - 2016).prg"
Metadata.Notes: Added an init routine at $8860 to set the current device number ($BA) to $01 (tape) before starting the game to disable highscore loading and saving to disk.
